title: Blood Planet
content:
It is a planet that is covered by a blood-colored light. 
Blood Ancestor
 personally dragged it from outer space and situated it a bit outside the orbit of 
Planet Tian Yun
. It is the third most influential force after 
Heavenly Fate Sect
 and 
Da Lou Sword Sect
 in the sphere of influence of Planet Tian Yun.
